proposal: Tinyland marched eight tanks. Respond with nine — or lose the ceremonial arms race.

options.label: Nine ceremonial tanks
options.result_text: Nine tanks rumble. One is rented. Tinyland sends a polite postcard.

options.label: Send flower tanks
options.result_text: Tanks deliver tulips. Boom salutes the stems. Neighbors cheer anyway.

options.label: Ignore Tinyland
options.result_text: No parade. Boom files a memo addressed to History itself.

authoring.visual_hook: nine tanks or flower tanks vs neighbor parade
authoring.writer_notes: REWRITE of placeholder; includes non-authoritarian flower path.

proposal: Palace perimeter is soft. Night curfew drill. Civilians practice locking doors on command.

options.label: Enforce the drill
options.result_text: Gates clang at dusk. Cats ignore the schedule. Boom sleeps better.

options.label: Symbolic whistle only
options.result_text: A whistle blows. Nobody locks. Boom calls it phased readiness.

options.label: Skip the drill
options.result_text: Doors stay unlocked. Boom patrols the rose garden alone.

authoring.writer_notes: Palace security without tank shopping.

proposal: Citizens forget who protects them. Mandate noon salute drills. Wrists will adapt.

options.label: Mandate noon salutes
options.result_text: Arms rise on the hour. Three sprained wrists. Order improves.

options.label: Allow friendly waves
options.result_text: Waves replace salutes. Boom mutters about discipline inflation.

authoring.writer_notes: State-gated off band/curfew/parade flags.

proposal: Neighbors want a marching band, not a drill. Same feet. Better snacks.

options.label: Fund the band
options.result_text: Accordions march in step. Boom calls it unauthorized morale.

options.label: Convert to drill
options.result_text: Instruments become batons. Olga cancels the snack schedule.

options.label: Keep weekends quiet
options.result_text: No band. Someone still practices trumpet at dawn.

authoring.visual_hook: accordion marching band in the square
authoring.writer_notes: Non-authoritarian military/order resolution.

proposal: Youth ratings sag. Release a dance remix of the anthem. Elders can lower the volume.

options.label: Release the remix
options.result_text: Ceremonies bounce. Elders demand volume forms. Luna smiles on air.

options.label: Keep the classic
options.result_text: Tradition holds. Luna still adds a subtle applause bed.

authoring.writer_notes: REWRITE of thin generic fill; propagandist identity hook.

proposal: Too many headlines confuse the narrative. One approved headline per day. Clarity sells.

options.label: One headline only
options.result_text: Boards show one line. Elites relax. Side stories file Form Quiet.

options.label: Allow three headlines
options.result_text: Three lines rotate. Luna calls it curated abundance.

options.label: Keep the free chaos
options.result_text: Headlines multiply. Luna schedules an emergency smile segment.

authoring.visual_hook: city boards with a single headline
authoring.writer_notes: Consequences emphasize order/elite/treasury, not happiness alone.

proposal: Unlicensed gossip is chaos. Sell rumor permits. Official whispers only.

options.label: Open the bureau
options.result_text: Whisper kiosks open. Permits sell out. Truth waits in line.

options.label: Ban all rumors
options.result_text: Silence spreads. People invent quieter rumors about the ban.

options.label: Ignore the gossip
options.result_text: Gossip blooms free. Luna files it under ambient color.

authoring.writer_notes: Soft queues one_headline_policy.

proposal: Host a Statistics Festival. Floats of pie charts. Forms as confetti. Morale via metrics.

options.label: Fund the festival
options.result_text: Pie-chart floats jam the square. Accuracy optional. Order rises.

options.label: Paper parade only
options.result_text: Citizens shuffle forms in rhythm. Luna calls it ambient data.

options.label: Cancel the festival
options.result_text: No floats. The unused confetti becomes Form 12 filler.

authoring.visual_hook: parade floats shaped like pie charts
authoring.writer_notes: Media card with treasury/order focus, not happiness campaign.

proposal: Preliminary request: fund a trial teaching clouds better shapes. Side effects possible. Maybe.

options.label: Fund the full trial
options.result_text: Clouds cooperate briefly. Budget does not. Maybe is delighted.

options.label: Fund a tiny pilot
options.result_text: One cloud becomes a hat. The lab requests more hats.

options.label: Deny politely
options.result_text: Maybe sketches revenge-shaped cumulus in the margins.

authoring.writer_notes: REWRITE of repeatable filler; costly success path; soft to cloud trial.

proposal: Hypothesis: toasters can file forms before breakfast. Preliminary. Possibly crumbly.

options.label: Deploy toaster clerks
options.result_text: Forms toast themselves. Crumbs enter the archive. Maybe notes success.

options.label: Keep it in the lab
options.result_text: One toaster stamps Form 12. Clerk Zero requests hazard pay.

options.label: Humans keep forms
options.result_text: Toasters remain kitchen-only. Maybe files a maybe-memo.

authoring.writer_notes: Scientific identity hook; soft queues scooter fleet.

proposal: Follow-up trial: relocate one rain cloud over the dry parade grounds. Contained. Probably.

options.label: Relocate the cloud
options.result_text: Parade grounds get rain. Markets get mud. Maybe calls it calibrated weather.

options.label: Simulate on paper
options.result_text: Paper clouds move perfectly. Real clouds decline the invitation.

options.label: Abort the trial
options.result_text: Cloud stays put. Maybe labels the folder 'pending delight'.

authoring.visual_hook: one cloud parked over parade grounds
authoring.writer_notes: Weather-adjacent, not censorship chain; flag-gated costly success.

proposal: Prototype scooter fleet for ministers. Wheels mostly stable. Steering: under review.

options.label: Roll out the fleet
options.result_text: Ministers wobble through traffic. Maybe records 'encouraging anomalies'.

options.label: Pilot in one square
options.result_text: One square becomes a scooter orbit. Pedestrians file zigzags.

options.label: Shelve the prototypes
options.result_text: Scooters enter storage. Maybe labels the crate 'not yet'.

authoring.writer_notes: Transport-adjacent; avoids anti-gravity bus chain premise.

proposal: Perimeter rumors say Boom plots drama. He denies it. Loudly. Fix the story or the gates.

options.label: Stage a medal ceremony
options.result_text: Medals glitter. Rumors quiet. Boom salutes the camera twice.

options.label: Audit the perimeter
options.result_text: Clipboards patrol the rose garden. Boom calls it respectful suspicion.

options.label: Cut his parade budget
options.result_text: Parade funds freeze. Boom salutes with visible contempt.

authoring.writer_notes: REWRITE; not Boom major-arc coup. Affinity-gated standalone.

proposal: Unused tanks will deliver flowers. Morale is a logistics problem. Approve florist crews.

options.label: Approve tank florists
options.result_text: Tanks plant tulips. Petals in the treads. Boom calls it soft power.

options.label: Keep tanks ceremonial
options.result_text: Tanks stay empty and shiny. Florists apply for Form Petal.

options.label: Refuse the florists
options.result_text: No flowers. Boom mutters about neglected optics.

authoring.writer_notes: Ceremonial military; not buy-more-tanks.

proposal: Crosswalks lack honor. Station guards who salute before green. Traffic becomes ceremony.

options.label: Station honor guards
options.result_text: Guards salute pedestrians. Jams lengthen. Boom is proud.

options.label: Use volunteer ushers
options.result_text: Neighbors wave cars across. Boom calls it soft perimeter duty.

options.label: Keep painted lines
options.result_text: Paint remains. Boom files a memo titled Undignified Asphalt.

authoring.writer_notes: Distinct from Pack A flag_traffic_system.

proposal: Endgame order slips. Form a volunteer night watch — or hire silent patrols. Choose paperwork carefully.

options.label: Fund volunteer watch
options.result_text: Lanterns on corners. Neighbors patrol. Boom calls it unauthorized courage.

options.label: Hire silent patrols
options.result_text: Quiet boots. Quieter streets. Forms for every shadow.

options.label: File and wait
options.result_text: The folder thickens. The night does not.

authoring.visual_hook: lantern night watch vs silent patrols
authoring.writer_notes: Second non-authoritarian military resolution; endgame stage.

proposal: Rain polls poorly. Mandate weather optimism bulletins. Clouds remain optional on air.

options.label: Mandate sunny copy
options.result_text: Bulletins insist on sunshine. Umbrellas sell anyway. Luna sparkles.

options.label: Allow honest forecasts
options.result_text: Rain is named rain. Luna schedules a smile segment about puddles.

authoring.writer_notes: Adjacent to weather-censorship chain; not the chain setup.

proposal: Instability needs entertainment. Launch Loyalty Variety Hour. Elites love the front row.

options.label: Launch the variety hour
options.result_text: Elites clap on cue. Order steadies. Ratings invent themselves.

options.label: Cancel the show
options.result_text: Studio lights dim. Luna files a segment titled Temporary Silence.

authoring.writer_notes: Elite/order focused; flag-gated from prior media.

proposal: Slogans drift. Register official catchphrases. Unregistered wit is a ratings risk.

options.label: Open the registry
options.result_text: Billboards quote the registry. Improvised jokes apply for stamps.

options.label: Publish soft guidelines
options.result_text: Guidelines smile. Citizens invent loopholes with excellent timing.

options.label: Refuse the registry
options.result_text: Slogans run wild. Luna schedules an emergency clarity hour.

authoring.writer_notes: Propagandist identity support; soft to reframing desk.

proposal: Endgame needs a reframing desk. Convert setbacks into exclusives. Budget optional. Narrative not.

options.label: Fund the desk
options.result_text: Setbacks become exclusives. Elites nod. The ledger winces.

options.label: Skeleton crew only
options.result_text: Two producers reframe everything. Quality varies. Optics hold.

options.label: Skip the desk
options.result_text: Raw headlines escape. Luna calls it an authenticity experiment.

authoring.writer_notes: Non-happiness-primary; order/elite/treasury trade-offs.

proposal: Trial: streetlights powered by lab coats. Preliminary glow. Occasional sparks. Maybe.

options.label: Deploy coat lighting
options.result_text: Streets glow faintly. Coats singe. Maybe rates success as promising.

options.label: Pilot one block
options.result_text: One block hums. Neighbors bring popcorn. Sparks politely.

options.label: Keep normal bulbs
options.result_text: Bulbs stay boring. Maybe files 'deferred luminescence'.

authoring.writer_notes: Successful but costly deploy path.

proposal: Hypothesis: synchronized naps save energy. Grid of cots. Side effects include snoring diplomacy.

options.label: Build the nap grid
options.result_text: Cots bloom. Productivity naps. Diplomats negotiate mid-yawn.

options.label: Pilot ministry naps
options.result_text: Ministers nap on schedule. Forms wait patiently.

options.label: Refuse the grid
options.result_text: No cots. Maybe doodles sleep curves in the margins.

authoring.writer_notes: Energy/medicine mash; three options.

proposal: Pilot clinic: treat minor ailments with maybe-serums. Results preliminary. Smiles optional.

options.label: Open the pilot clinic
options.result_text: Patients improve, mostly. Budget does not. Maybe is thrilled.

options.label: Lab hours only
options.result_text: Limited hours. Limited miracles. Forms for every vial.

options.label: Delay indefinitely
options.result_text: Clinic stays theoretical. Maybe labels it 'pending kindness'.

authoring.writer_notes: Affinity-gated costly success; scientific identity.

proposal: Science wants a hypothesis board. Every experiment needs a line item. Curiosity has a price.

options.label: Fund the board
options.result_text: Hypotheses get budget codes. Maybe cheers. Penny winces politely.

options.label: Issue science coupons
options.result_text: Coupons for curiosity. Labs stack receipts. Innovation waits in line.

options.label: Refuse the board
options.result_text: No board. Experiments improvise. Penny calls it fiscal hygiene.

authoring.writer_notes: Penny speaker; treasury gate; scientific/capitalist fork.
